hb5ca82d0g1f8dg401fga8f0g7a98579d0813: Tell me, Lae'zel, what is it like on the Astral Plane? Your home realm intrigues me.
ha9d3c7e1g553bg4437gad4dg02c085b27e9c: Githyanki lay their eggs on other planes. They cannot mature in the Astral.
